strategy_description: Placeholder no-op; Phase 1 = counterparty tape analysis in analysis_outputs/.
Phase2: tight extract BBO (<=2) -> tighter/larger MM; optional Mark67 tick lift from precomputed tape keys; simple VEV/hydro MM.
Phase3: Sonic joint gate (VEV_5200 & VEV_5300 BBO<=2) for aggressive sizing; else extract-only tight (v1) or wide; Mark67 optional.
v2 + Phase3 evidence: wider/smaller VEV_5300 under joint tight; tighter VEV_5200 (BBO clamp masked half-spread effect; same PnL as v2).
v2 + skip VEV_5300 quotes entirely under joint tight (tape: M01→M22 5300 negative fwd); PnL unchanged vs v2 — extract/hydro dominate.
v1 + tape-scheduled fade: under Sonic joint tight, skip VEV_5300 bid on ticks in signals_m01_m22_5300_sonic_tight.json (Mark01→Mark22 5300 prints; Phase3 negative fwd20).
v1 + live market_trades: fade VEV_5300 bid when Sonic joint tight AND tick tape has Mark01→Mark22 on 5300 (reads state.market_trades).

v6 + basket fade: under Sonic joint tight, if state.market_trades shows Mark01→Mark22 on each of VEV_5300–6500 in the same tick, skip bids on that full wing ladder (tape: 108/132 joint-tight M01→M22-on-5300 ticks; run_r4_basket_wing_stats.py).

v6 + voucher inventory skew: bid/ask shifted by min(3, |pos|//50) ticks in the direction that discourages adding to the same-side exposure (long -> lower quotes). Mark01→Mark22 5300 fade under joint tight unchanged.
v6 + stronger voucher inventory skew (step 25, max 8 ticks on bid/ask vs mid); same Mark01→Mark22 5300 fade under joint tight and Mark67 lift.

trader_v9 base + extract inventory skew (step 40, max 3) on EMA bid/ask + aggressive extract buy at best ask qty 22 when extract BBO tight AND Mark67 tape key (Phase 1 edge). Voucher skew and M01→M22 5300 fade unchanged from v9.
Same as trader_v10 except Mark67 aggressive extract buy (qty 22 at ask) only when Sonic joint tight (VEV_5200 & VEV_5300 spread≤2) in addition to extract tight + tape key.
v11 logic but Mark67 take whenever extract tight + key: qty 8 if Sonic joint loose, qty 22 if joint tight (hybrid vs v11 joint-only 22).
Same as trader_v11 except joint-gated Mark67 take qty 35 at ask (was 22).
trader_v11 + skip Mark67 joint-gated take when extract long position > 85 (M67_TAKE_MAX_LONG); else same qty 22 at ask.
trader_v11 with joint-gated Mark67 take qty 16 at ask (v11 uses 22).
trader_v14 with stricter cap M67_TAKE_MAX_LONG=50 (skip joint Mark67 take when extract long > 50).
trader_v11 + HYDRO bid widened 2 ticks when this tick has an aggressive buy on HYDROGEL_PACK with Mark 14 passive seller (price>=ask, seller Mark 14; same classifier as tape analysis).
trader_v11 + under Sonic joint tight, suppress VEV_5300 bid when Mark 22 aggressively sells on 5300 this tick (price<=best bid, seller Mark 22); still fades M01->M22 on 5300 when joint tight.
